explanation: This command simulates a child process of sqlservr.exe by launching cmd.exe with a benign command. It uses the omission technique by removing unnecessary arguments while preserving the process creation behavior.

This command simulates a suspicious child process of sqlservr.exe by launching PowerShell with a benign command. It uses substitution by replacing long-form syntax with short-form and ensures the command is still parsed correctly.
This command simulates a child process of sqlservr.exe by launching cmd.exe with a benign command. It uses insertion by adding quotes and reordering to test parsing behavior.

This command simulates a suspicious child process of sqlservr.exe by launching wsl with a benign command. It uses omission to simplify the command while maintaining the same process creation behavior.
